evidence_quotes.quote: video game publishers destroying their games so as to force players to go buy their next game.
If I pay for a video game, I should be able to play that video game and not just one day find out that the publisher has decided to shut it down.

paragraphs.text: I hope you will also address the issue of some video game publishers destroying their games so as to force players to go buy their next game. If I pay for a video game, I should be able to play that video game and not just one day find out that the publisher has decided to shut it down. I know I'm not the only one worried about this as there was recently a EU Citizens initiative called "Stop Killing Games" which garnered over a million signatories.
